creator: cpm@freebsd.org
text:
Comment on attachment 186069
dream-2.1.1.patch

>--- pkg-descr	2017-09-05 00:57:40.863221000 +0000
>+++ /usr/ports/audio/dream/pkg-descr	2016-02-17 23:06:37.000000000 +0000
>@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
> Open-Source Software Implementation of a DRM (Digital Radio Mondiale) Receiver
> under the GNU General Public License (GPL)
> 
>-WWW: https://sourceforge.net/p/drm/wiki/Home/
>+WWW: http://drm.sourceforge.net/wiki/index.php/Main_Page

The attached patch is wrong. Please, update it to reflect the change accordingly :)
